text.title: agentic-commerce-future-trends Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agentic-commerce-future-trends as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Different company descriptions on each platform — slightly different service list, different founding year, different tagline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inconsistency signals unreliability to AI entity recognition systems. Even minor inconsistencies (abbreviated vs. full company name) reduce confidence in entity identification.

failure-mode.description: Continuing to optimize only for keyword rankings while AI search share grows.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keyword rankings measure one channel that is shrinking. Businesses that ignore AI search metrics will see total discovery traffic decline even if keyword rankings hold.

failure-mode.description: Assuming agentic commerce only affects B2C e-commerce.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: B2B SaaS, professional services, and local services are early agentic commerce adoption areas. AI agents researching CRM solutions or booking tradespeople are already active in 2026.
